name: libayatana-appindicator3-1
title: libayatana-appindicator3-1
description:
Ayatana Application Indicators (GTK-3+ version)
A library and indicator to take menus from applications and place them in
the panel.
.
This package contains shared libraries to be used by applications compiled
against GTK-3+.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libayatana-appindicator3-1 because Ayatana Application Indicators (GTK-3+ version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libayatana-appindicator3-1 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libayatana-appindicator3-1 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libayatana-appindicator3-1 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
